center.name: 奇里基火山
center.summary: 奇里基火山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括高地大蜂鸟、高山鹪鹩，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Costa Rica it occurs in the Cordillera Central and Cordillera de Talamanca and in Panama only in the Volcán Barú massif of Chiriquí Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: browni is found on Volcán Barú, Volcán de Chiriquí, and Cerro Copete in western Panama. The timberline wren inhabits páramo and near-páramo moorland at the upper edge of tree line, and is partial to bamboo thickets
